judgeReasoning: All three REQUIRED rubric points are met: (1) default described as static/local BM25 lexical index with no DB or embeddings (hosted vector DB unnecessary); (2) specific warranted conditions given (corpus >~10k chunks or vocabulary/intent mismatch), not generic; (3) lexical/BM25 index explicitly kept for candidate retrieval/exact matches while embeddings are complementary. No rubric violations or incorrect claims present. Minor numeric phrasing difference (10k vs tens of thousands) does not affect correctness.
